title: Senior Software Engineer - Siemens India Global Group - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Siemens India Global Group - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Siemens India Global Group, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Bhubaneswar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Siemens India Global Group:
Siemens India Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Siemens India Global Group!
